metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4509
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 1I shows tenascin-C-immunolabeled gold particles in the synaptic cleft of a calyx in a crista peripheral zone.
Of note, gold labelling seems to be localized primarily outside of glutamate release sites (ribbons).
The synapse investigated in this paper is a glutamatergic synapse in the vestibular organ in the inner ear that closely resembles cochlear hair cell ribbon synapses (PMID: 16944206)

18/01/2021 Dnyanada: The authors refer to Table1 for information on antibody specificity. The Anti-Tenascin antibody was checked for cross-reactivity by pre-adsorption with Tenascin peptide as described in PMID: 20155736. This data could not be retrieved.. Experimental description: Adult Long-Evans rats of both sexes were deeply anesthetized with Nembutal (80 mg/kg)... (p. 10102)

antibody:
Tenascin-C (rb), Chemicon/Millipore, AB19013
